entities.description: A state of micronutrient deficiency to be eradicated through food fortification

entities.description: The process of adding micronutrients to food to eradicate hidden hunger

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action found to be predominant in governing grain iron and zinc concentrations

entities.description: A component of epistasis responsible for governing grain iron and zinc concentrations

entities.name: DOMINANCE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action responsible for governing plant height, panicle length, panicle width, grain yield, and 100-grain weight
